title: Parathelypteris singalanensis
taxonomy: Parathelypteris singalanensis is classified as a species of fern within the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Parathelypteris and is a part of the Pteridophyta division, which comprises all vascular plants that reproduce via spores. The species is native to Indonesia and is characterized by its distinctive frond shape and size. Parathelypteris singalanensis is a relatively rare species and is often found in shaded, humid environments. The classification of Parathelypteris singalanensis is still subject to ongoing research and taxonomic updates.
